landing.badge: Built for Indian freelancers & gig workers
landing.heroSubtitle: TaxEase turns your scattered invoices and bank statements into a clear, complete ITR-4 worksheet — in minutes, not days.
landing.processHeadline: From messy PDFs to filed return
landing.testimonialsHeadline: Real people, real peace of mind
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Indian freelancers who've simplified their tax filing with TaxEase.
landing.footer: Built for Indian freelancers. © 2025 TaxEase. For informational use only.
landing.feature1Desc: Upload PDFs from Upwork, Swiggy, Uber or any bank. Our AI reads them instantly and organises your income by platform.
landing.feature2Desc: Ask anything — deductions, deadlines, advance tax. Get plain-language answers backed by the latest Income Tax Act.
landing.feature3Desc: See your gross income, 44ADA deductions, tax liability and balance due in one beautiful view — updated live.
landing.feature4Desc: Generate a ready-to-use computation worksheet with a single click. Download as PDF and hand it to your CA.
landing.feature5Desc: Never miss an advance tax deadline again. Track June, September, December and March instalments automatically.
landing.feature6Desc: Built specifically for freelancers and gig workers who qualify for presumptive taxation under Section 44ADA.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in under 30 seconds — no credit card required.
landing.step2Desc: Drop PDFs from your platforms. AI parses everything automatically.
landing.step3Desc: See income breakdown, deductions and exact tax liability.
landing.step4Desc: Download your worksheet and file ITR-4 confidently.

auth.enterUserId: Enter your registered User ID to sign in.

auth.opt44ADAHint: Recommended for most gig workers — 50% deduction on gross income
auth.loginPanelSubtitle: Sign in to your GigSaathi dashboard and pick up right where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join Indian freelancers who've simplified their tax life with GigSaathi.
auth.testimonialQuote: GigSaathi made me realise I'd been overpaying for three years. Got ₹18,000 back!

onboarding.subtitle: Set up your profile once — GigSaathi will tailor every calculation to you.

chat.suggestion1: What is my total tax liability?
chat.suggestion2: How can I reduce my tax this year?
chat.suggestion3: When is my next advance tax deadline?
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your taxes, deadlines, deductions…
chat.footerReady: Attach payout PDFs (Swiggy, Uber, Upwork) · Agent calls real backend tools
chat.footerOnboarding: ⚠️ Complete your profile setup above to unlock chat
chat.footerDefault: Attach a PDF to get started — or complete your profile first
chat.welcomeMsg:
Namaste{{name}}! 🙏

I am your **GigSaathi AI Tax Advisor**, powered by Gemini.

I can:
- Calculate your exact Section 44ADA tax liability
- Parse your Swiggy / Uber / Upwork payout PDFs
- Tell you upcoming advance tax deadlines
- Generate your ITR-4 computation worksheet

Ask me anything, or **attach a payout statement PDF** using the 📎 button below.

widgets.noDeadlineDesc: Upload your payout PDFs and the agent will calculate your advance tax schedule
widgets.taxNotCalcDesc: Ask the agent to calculate your tax, or upload a payout PDF to get started
widgets.noIncomeDesc: Attach a payout PDF in the chat using the 📎 button

upload.heading: Upload Statements
upload.subtitle: Drop your earnings PDFs from Swiggy, Uber, Upwork, or your bank. Gemini AI will extract all income automatically.
upload.dropHere: Drop PDFs here or click to browse
upload.dropHint: Swiggy · Uber · Upwork · Fiverr · Bank statements · Max 10 files
upload.quickTestDesc: No real payout statements on hand? Download these mock PDFs and drop them into the upload zone above to test the system instantly.

taxSummary.heading: Tax Summary — FY 2025-26
taxSummary.regimeOptimizerDesc: Under Section 44ADA presumptive taxation, compare the New Regime (default, zero deductions) against the Old Regime (Section 80C & 80D deductions allowed).
taxSummary.verdictNew: 🟢 Verdict: The New regime is more beneficial for your presumptive profile.
taxSummary.verdictOld: 🔵 Verdict: The Old regime is more beneficial with your declared deductions.
taxSummary.urgentPayment: Next payment of {{amount}} due in {{days}} days!
taxSummary.noTaxDesc: Upload your income statements first and the AI will calculate your exact tax liability.

itr.heading: ITR-4 Export
itr.subtitle: Your tax worksheet ready for filing — based on your actual uploaded income data
itr.disclaimer: This worksheet summarises your computed tax. Verify figures on the Income Tax portal before filing. Consult a CA for official submission.
itr.noItrDesc: Upload your income documents first to generate your ITR-4 worksheet.
itr.name: Name
itr.clickGenerate: Click "Generate Worksheet" to see the full ITR-4 breakdown
